org.apache.dubbo.rpc.ProtocolServer

    程序包 说明

    org.apache.dubbo.registry.integration  
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc  
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol  
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo
    FutureAdapter was in dubbo-rpc-dubbo module, considering some users will use this class directly, keep the package not changed.
    org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.rest
